metadata.summary: Home Assistant cloud integration by Nabu Casa, Inc.

modules.name: hass_nabucasa.utils
documentation: Helper methods to handle the time in Home Assistant.

functions.name: hass_nabucasa.utils.utc_from_timestamp
documentation: Return a UTC time from a timestamp.

functions.name: hass_nabucasa.utils.parse_date
documentation: Convert a date string to a date object.

functions.name: hass_nabucasa.utils.server_context_modern
documentation:
Return an SSL context following the Mozilla recommendations.

TLS configuration follows the best-practice guidelines specified here:
https://wiki.mozilla.org/Security/Server_Side_TLS
Modern guidelines are followed.

functions.name: hass_nabucasa.utils.next_midnight
documentation: Return the seconds till next local midnight.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.utils.Registry.register
documentation: Return decorator to register item with a specific name.

modules.name: hass_nabucasa.client
documentation: Client interface for Home Assistant to cloud.

classes.name: hass_nabucasa.client.RemoteActivationNotAllowed
documentation: Raised when it's not allowed to remotely activate remote UI.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.client_name
documentation: Return name of the client, this will be used as the user-agent.

documentation: Return true if we want start a remote connection.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.cloud_started
documentation: Cloud started with an active subscription.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_cloud_connect_update
documentation:
Process cloud remote message to client.

If it's not allowed to remotely enable remote control, the implementation
should raise RemoteActivationNotAllowed

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_cloud_connection_info
documentation: Process cloud connection info message to client.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_alexa_message
documentation: Process cloud alexa message to client.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_system_message
documentation: Process cloud system message to client.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_google_message
documentation: Process cloud google message to client.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.async_webhook_message
documentation: Process cloud webhook message to client.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.client.CloudClient.user_message
documentation: Create a message for user to UI.

documentation: Get if cloud is logged in.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.Cloud.register_on_initialized
documentation:
Register an async on_initialized callback.

on_initialized callbacks are called after all on_start callbacks.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.Cloud.path
documentation:
Get config path inside cloud dir.

Async friendly.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.Cloud.run_executor
documentation:
Run function inside executore.

Return a awaitable object.

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.Cloud.logout
documentation: Close connection and remove all credentials.

documentation: Write user info to a file.

documentation: Initialize the cloud component (load auth and maybe start).

documentation: Finish initializing the cloud component (load auth and maybe start).

methods.name: hass_nabucasa.Cloud._decode_claims
documentation: Decode the claims in a token.
Store the configuration of the cloud connection.
